templates.nlQuery: Show me apartments in Zurich up to 6k with min 2 rooms
templates.sql: SELECT pl.image_gcs_uri, pl.id, pl.title, pl.description, pl.bedrooms, pl.price, pl.city, pl.country, pl.canton FROM property_listings pl WHERE LOWER(pl.city) = LOWER('Zurich') AND pl.price <= 6000 AND pl.bedrooms >= 2 LIMIT 25;
templates.intent: Find apartments filtered strictly by city, price, and room count without semantic search
templates.manifest: Find property listings filtered by city, price, and bedroom count

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Show me apartments in $1 up to $2 with min $3 rooms
parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT pl.image_gcs_uri, pl.id, pl.title, pl.description, pl.bedrooms, pl.price, pl.city, pl.country, pl.canton FROM property_listings pl WHERE LOWER(pl.city) = LOWER($1) AND pl.price <= $2 AND pl.bedrooms >= $3 LIMIT 25;

templates.sql: WITH QueryEmbeddings AS (SELECT mysql.ml_embedding('gemini-embedding-001', 'Lovely wooden cabin') AS text_emb, mysql.ml_embedding('multimodalembedding@001', 'Lovely wooden cabin') AS image_emb) SELECT pl.image_gcs_uri, pl.id, pl.title, pl.description, pl.bedrooms, pl.price, pl.city, pl.country, pl.canton, (0.6 * (1 - vector_distance(pde.description_embedding, q.text_emb, 'distance_measure=cosine')) + 0.4 * (1 - vector_distance(pie.image_embedding, q.image_emb, 'distance_measure=cosine'))) AS similarity FROM property_listings pl LEFT JOIN property_description_embeddings pde ON pl.id = pde.property_id LEFT JOIN property_image_embeddings pie ON pl.id = pie.property_id CROSS JOIN QueryEmbeddings q ORDER BY similarity DESC LIMIT 25;
templates.intent: Search for properties based solely on semantic and visual similarity to a text description
templates.manifest: Find property listings ordered by semantic similarity to a search phrase

parameterized.parameterized_sql: WITH QueryEmbeddings AS (SELECT mysql.ml_embedding('gemini-embedding-001', $1) AS text_emb, mysql.ml_embedding('multimodalembedding@001', $1) AS image_emb) SELECT pl.image_gcs_uri, pl.id, pl.title, pl.description, pl.bedrooms, pl.price, pl.city, pl.country, pl.canton, (0.6 * (1 - vector_distance(pde.description_embedding, q.text_emb, 'distance_measure=cosine')) + 0.4 * (1 - vector_distance(pie.image_embedding, q.image_emb, 'distance_measure=cosine'))) AS similarity FROM property_listings pl LEFT JOIN property_description_embeddings pde ON pl.id = pde.property_id LEFT JOIN property_image_embeddings pie ON pl.id = pie.property_id CROSS JOIN QueryEmbeddings q ORDER BY similarity DESC LIMIT 25;

templates.nlQuery: Show me modern apartments in Zurich with industrial look up to 6k with min 2 rooms
templates.sql: WITH QueryEmbeddings AS (SELECT mysql.ml_embedding('gemini-embedding-001', 'modern apartments with industrial look') AS text_emb, mysql.ml_embedding('multimodalembedding@001', 'modern apartments with industrial look') AS image_emb) SELECT pl.image_gcs_uri, pl.id, pl.title, pl.description, pl.bedrooms, pl.price, pl.city, pl.country, pl.canton, (0.6 * (1 - vector_distance(pde.description_embedding, q.text_emb, 'distance_measure=cosine')) + 0.4 * (1 - vector_distance(pie.image_embedding, q.image_emb, 'distance_measure=cosine'))) AS similarity FROM property_listings pl LEFT JOIN property_description_embeddings pde ON pl.id = pde.property_id LEFT JOIN property_image_embeddings pie ON pl.id = pie.property_id CROSS JOIN QueryEmbeddings q WHERE LOWER(pl.city) = LOWER('Zurich') AND pl.price <= 6000 AND pl.bedrooms >= 2 ORDER BY similarity DESC LIMIT 25;
templates.intent: Find apartments in a specific city with price and room constraints, ordered by visual and semantic similarity to a description
templates.manifest: Find property listings in a given city with price and room limits, ordered by semantic similarity to a search phrase

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Show me $1 in $2 up to $3 with min $4 rooms
parameterized.parameterized_sql: WITH QueryEmbeddings AS (SELECT mysql.ml_embedding('gemini-embedding-001', $1) AS text_emb, mysql.ml_embedding('multimodalembedding@001', $1) AS image_emb) SELECT pl.image_gcs_uri, pl.id, pl.title, pl.description, pl.bedrooms, pl.price, pl.city, pl.country, pl.canton, (0.6 * (1 - vector_distance(pde.description_embedding, q.text_emb, 'distance_measure=cosine')) + 0.4 * (1 - vector_distance(pie.image_embedding, q.image_emb, 'distance_measure=cosine'))) AS similarity FROM property_listings pl LEFT JOIN property_description_embeddings pde ON pl.id = pde.property_id LEFT JOIN property_image_embeddings pie ON pl.id = pie.property_id CROSS JOIN QueryEmbeddings q WHERE LOWER(pl.city) = LOWER($2) AND pl.price <= $3 AND pl.bedrooms >= $4 ORDER BY similarity DESC LIMIT 25;
